question_tagalog: Bakit ang cute-cute mo pag nagbe-baby talk ka?
question_english: Why are you so cute when you baby talk?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw yung pinakamalaking baby ko.
quote_english: You're my biggest baby.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang laging bine-baby kita?
question_english: Do you want me to always treat you like a baby?
quote_tagalog: Aalagaan kita hanggang pagtanda natin.
quote_english: I'll take care of you until we grow old.

question_tagalog: Ano yung paboritong tawag ko sayo pag nilalambing kita?
question_english: What's my favorite pet name for you when I'm sweet?
quote_tagalog: Baby kita forever.
quote_english: You're my baby forever.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba sinusubuan kita pag kumakain tayo?
question_english: Do you like it when I feed you when we eat?
quote_tagalog: Say aaaaah para sa baby ko.
quote_english: Say aaaaah for my baby.

question_tagalog: Pano kita papatulugin pag hindi ka makatulog?
question_english: How do I put you to sleep when you can't sleep?
quote_tagalog: Dede-padedehin kita ng pagmamahal.
quote_english: I'll nourish you with love.

question_tagalog: Ano yung reaksyon mo pag tinatawag kitang 'baby' sa public?
question_english: What's your reaction when I call you 'baby' in public?
quote_tagalog: Proud akong baby kita sa harap nila.
quote_english: I'm proud you're my baby in front of them.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang hinihimas ko buhok mo hanggang makatulog ka?
question_english: Do you want me to stroke your hair until you fall asleep?
quote_tagalog: Karelax mo yung kamay ko.
quote_english: My hands relax you.

question_tagalog: Pag pagod ka, pano yung pa-baby na yakap mo?
question_english: When you're tired, how do you give a baby hug?
quote_tagalog: Kanlungan mo palagi ang bisig ko.
quote_english: My arms are always your shelter.

question_tagalog: Anong boses yung ginagamit mo pag nagpapa-cute ka sakin?
question_english: What voice do you use when trying to be cute with me?
quote_tagalog: Kinikilig ako sa baby voice mo.
quote_english: I get butterflies from your baby voice.

question_tagalog: Pag may sakit ka, gusto mo ba yung extra baby treatment?
question_english: When you're sick, do you want that extra baby treatment?
quote_tagalog: Nurse mo ko at caregiver mo rin.
quote_english: I'm your nurse and caregiver too.

question_tagalog: Pano ka magtampo in a baby way?
question_english: How do you sulk in a baby way?
quote_tagalog: Cute mo kahit nakapout ka pa.
quote_english: You're cute even when you pout.

question_tagalog: Bakit ang galing mong magpaamo pag nagbe-baby talk?
question_english: Why are you so good at taming me when you baby talk?
quote_tagalog: Talo agad ako pag ganyan ka.
quote_english: I instantly lose when you're like that.

question_tagalog: Ano feeling pag kinakarga kita na parang baby?
question_english: How does it feel when I carry you like a baby?
quote_tagalog: Buhat-buhat kita habang-buhay.
quote_english: I'll carry you for a lifetime.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang kinakausap kita na parang bata minsan?
question_english: Do you like it when I talk to you like a kid sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Baby love, andito na ko.
quote_english: Baby love, I'm here now.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko binababy pag ako naman ang pagod?
question_english: How do you baby me when I'm the one who's tired?
quote_tagalog: Salamat kasi inaalagaan mo rin ako.
quote_english: Thank you for taking care of me too.

question_tagalog: Nahihiya ka bang maging soft baby sa harap ng iba?
question_english: Are you shy to be a soft baby in front of others?
quote_tagalog: Sakin lang pwede lumabas yan.
quote_english: That can only come out for me.

question_tagalog: Anong gagawin mo pag bini-baby kita sa chat?
question_english: What will you do when I baby you in chat?
quote_tagalog: Kahit on-screen, ang sweet natin.
quote_english: Even on-screen, we're sweet.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang bumabalik tayo sa pagkabata pag tayo lang?
question_english: Why does it feel like we revert to childhood when it's just us?
quote_tagalog: Safe kasi tayo sa isa't isa.
quote_english: Because we're safe with each other.

question_tagalog: Pag may toy store, anong pinapabili mo saking laruan?
question_english: At a toy store, what toy would you ask me to buy?
quote_tagalog: Bibilhan kita ng lahat ng gusto mo.
quote_english: I'll buy you everything you want.

question_tagalog: Pag nalungkot ka, gusto mo lang bang yakapin ka ng patagilid?
question_english: When sad, do you just want to be hugged sideways?
quote_tagalog: Iduduyan kita palagi dyan sa bisig ko.
quote_english: I'll always cradle you in my arms.

question_tagalog: Gumagaan ba araw mo pag tinatawag kitang 'my baby'?
question_english: Does your day lighten up when I call you 'my baby'?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang ibang baby para sakin.
quote_english: There's no other baby for me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pinipigilan na wag magpa-cute pag seryoso usapan?
question_english: How do you stop being cute during serious talks?
quote_tagalog: Kahit naiinis ako, napapa-smile moko.
quote_english: Even when I'm annoyed, you make me smile.

question_tagalog: Kumportable ka ba pag hinahalikan ko lagi noo mo?
question_english: Are you comfortable when I always kiss your forehead?
quote_tagalog: Respeto at pagmamahal yung halik na yan.
quote_english: That kiss means respect and love.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang pinaka-cute mong pambobola sakin?
question_english: What is your cutest flattering word for me?
quote_tagalog: Mas cute ka pa sa lahat ng pambobola mo.
quote_english: You're cuter than all your flatters.

question_tagalog: Pag nanghihingi ka ng atensyon, pano ka mag-baby modes?
question_english: When seeking attention, how do you go into baby mode?
quote_tagalog: Bibigay ko buong time ko sayo.
quote_english: I'll give all my time to you.

question_tagalog: Mas gusto mo ba yung binababy ka or ikaw nambababy?
question_english: Do you prefer being babied or being the one who babies?
quote_tagalog: Palitan tayo sa pagiging baby.
quote_english: Let's take turns being the baby.

question_tagalog: Pag malambing ako sayo unexpectedly, nagugulat ka ba?
question_english: When I'm unexpectedly sweet to you, do you get surprised?
quote_tagalog: Expected ko na mahal mo ko.
quote_english: I already expect you love me.

question_tagalog: May stuff toy ka ba na naiimagine na kamukha ko?
question_english: Do you have a plush toy that you imagine looks like me?
quote_tagalog: Mas masarap akong yakapin kaysa dyan.
quote_english: I'm nicer to hug than that.

question_tagalog: Pano kita lalambingin pag gigisingin na kita sa umaga?
question_english: How do I gently wake you up in the morning?
quote_tagalog: Good morning baby, gising na.
quote_english: Good morning baby, wake up.

question_tagalog: Ano yung reaksyon mo pag tinapik-tapik ko yung ulo mo?
question_english: What's your reaction when I pat your head?
quote_tagalog: Good job, baby.
quote_english: Good job, baby.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka bang the softest version of you is with me?
question_english: Do you believe the softest version of you is with me?
quote_tagalog: Dito mo ilabas lahat ng pagiging soft mo.
quote_english: Let out all your softness here.

question_tagalog: Pag umiiyak ka ba, gusto mo ng baby treatment?
question_english: When you cry, do you want the baby treatment?
quote_tagalog: Punasan ko luha ng baby ko.
quote_english: I'll wipe my baby's tears.

question_tagalog: Bakit pag nagso-sorry ka, may baby tone kang kasama?
question_english: Why is it when you apologize, there's a baby tone with it?
quote_tagalog: Madaya ka, di kita matiis.
quote_english: You're unfair, I can't resist you.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang hinaharot kita bago tayo matulog?
question_english: Do you like it when I play with you before we sleep?
quote_tagalog: Laging masaya pag magkatabi tayo.
quote_english: It's always fun when we're beside each other.

question_tagalog: Na-t-turn off ka ba pag naging childlike ako for a moment?
question_english: Do you get turned off when I become childlike for a moment?
quote_tagalog: Ang cute-cute mo nga tignan eh.
quote_english: You actually look so cute.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko iko-comfort like a baby?
question_english: How will you comfort me like a baby?
quote_tagalog: Sssh, andito lang ako baby ko.
quote_english: Shush, I'm just right here my baby.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi mong nararamdaman pag yakap kita behind?
question_english: What do you always feel when I hug you from behind?
quote_tagalog: Back hug means I got your back.
quote_english: Back hug means I got your back.

question_tagalog: Pano mo i-describe yung lambing ko sayo in 1 word?
question_english: How do you describe my affection in 1 word?
quote_tagalog: Overwhelming in a good way.
quote_english: Overwhelming in a good way.

question_tagalog: Anong specific na kanta yung nagpapakalma sayo like a lullaby?
question_english: What specific song calms you down like a lullaby?
quote_tagalog: Boses ko na lang ang lullaby mo.
quote_english: Let my voice be your lullaby.

question_tagalog: Pag naka-pout ka, ano ibig sabihin nun?
question_english: When you pout, what does it mean?
quote_tagalog: Kiss ko na yang labi mo.
quote_english: Let me kiss those lips.

question_tagalog: Ano ang reaksyon mo pag sinasabi kong "ikaw yung baby ko" sa harap ng iba?
question_english: What's your reaction when I say 'you are my baby' in front of others?
quote_tagalog: Oo, akin lang ang baby ko.
quote_english: Yes, my baby is only mine.

question_tagalog: Pano pag minsan nakakalimutan kong i-baby ka?
question_english: What if sometimes I forget to baby you?
quote_tagalog: Bumabawi naman ako araw-araw.
quote_english: I make up for it every single day.

question_tagalog: Pinipigilan mo ba kilig mo pag baby talk tayo?
question_english: Do you hold back your butterflies when we baby talk?
quote_tagalog: Wag mo kong pigilan kiligin sayo.
quote_english: Don't stop me from getting butterflies from you.

question_tagalog: Kumportable ka ba na i-baby face yung screensaver ng phone ko?
question_english: Are you comfortable having your baby face as my phone screensaver?
quote_tagalog: Mukha mo lang gusto kong makita agad.
quote_english: Your face is what I want to see right away.

question_tagalog: Pag kinurot ko pisngi mo, ano feeling mo?
question_english: When I pinch your cheeks, how do you feel?
quote_tagalog: Ang lambot ng cheeks ng baby ko.
quote_english: My baby's cheeks are so soft.

question_tagalog: Ilang buwan na yung baby kong 'to?
question_english: How many months old is this baby of mine?
quote_tagalog: Baby ka sa lahat ng oras.
quote_english: You're a baby at all times.

question_tagalog: Nahihiya ka ba pag naging clingy and baby ako pag may bisita?
question_english: Are you shy when I become clingy and baby when there are guests?
quote_tagalog: Hayaan mo sila, tayo naman 'to.
quote_english: Let them be, it's about us anyway.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko binibigyan ng assurance in a baby way?
question_english: How do you give me assurance in a baby way?
quote_tagalog: Sayo lang yung baby mo.
quote_english: Your baby belongs only to you.

question_tagalog: Pag nagsisikip ang dibdib mo, gusto mo din ba dumedede or humiga sa chest ko?
question_english: When your chest is heavy, do you also want to rest on my chest?
quote_tagalog: Dito ka lang para safe ka.
quote_english: Just stay here so you're safe.

question_tagalog: Nagpapatugtog ka ba ng malambing na kanta pag gusto mo ng pa-baby time?
question_english: Do you play a sweet song when you want baby time?
quote_tagalog: Tara sayaw tayo nang mahina.
quote_english: Let's dance slowly.

question_tagalog: Ano ang feeling pag hinahaplos ko mukha mo bago ka matulog?
question_english: What's the feeling when I caress your face before you sleep?
quote_tagalog: Sleep tight, my sweet baby.
quote_english: Sleep tight, my sweet baby.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang laging hawak yung kamay ko pag natutulog?
question_english: Do you always want to hold my hand when sleeping?
quote_tagalog: Hinding-hindi kita bibitawan kahit tulog.
I will never let you go even asleep.

question_tagalog: Saan galing yung nickname nating dalawa?
question_english: Where did our nicknames come from?
quote_tagalog: Sariling atin lang yung tawagan natin.
quote_english: Our nicknames are uniquely ours.

question_tagalog: Pano kita pakakalmahin pag uminit ulo mo?
question_english: How do I calm you down when you get hot-headed?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap mong iduyan sa pag-ibig ko.
quote_english: It feels good to cradle you in my love.

question_tagalog: Bakit ang hilig mo sumiksik like a baby?
question_english: Why do you love squeezing in like a baby?
quote_tagalog: Ang init mo kasi yakapin.
quote_english: Because you feel so warm to hug.

question_tagalog: Pag ba nabulol ako, nata-turn off ka o natutuwa ka lang?
question_english: If I stutter, do you get turned off or just amused?
quote_tagalog: Ang cute mo magkamali sa salita.
quote_english: You're cute when you mispronounce words.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang una mong hinihingi sakin panggising?
question_english: What's the very first thing you ask from me when waking up?
quote_tagalog: Good morning kiss para sa baby ko.
quote_english: Good morning kiss for my baby.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging candy ka, anong flavor ka? Kasi ang sweet mo.
question_english: If you were candy, what flavor would you be? Because you're sweet.
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang paborito kong flavor.
quote_english: You're my only favorite flavor.

question_tagalog: Mahaba pa ba ang pasensya mo sa pagiging baby ko?
question_english: Do you still have long patience for my baby moments?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw ikaw lang iintindihin ko.
quote_english: Every day you're the only one I'll understand.

question_tagalog: Anong huling bagay yung sasabihin mo sakin bago matulog na in a baby voice?
question_english: What's the last thing you'll tell me before sleeping in a baby voice?
quote_tagalog: I yuv u, baby ko.
quote_english: I yuv u, my baby.
